device_name: EFAI Intelligent Cardiothoracic Ratio (iCTR) Assessment System
intended_use: EFAI Intelligent Cardiothoracic Ratio Assessment System (or iCTR) is a software for use by hospital and clinics to automatically assess the cardiothoracic ratio (CTR) of a chest X-ray image from the X
intended_use_full: EFAI Intelligent Cardiothoracic Ratio Assessment System (or iCTR) is a software for use by hospital and clinics to automatically assess the cardiothoracic ratio (CTR) of a chest X-ray image from the X-ray imager subject. The iCTR is designed to measure the maximal transverse diameter of heart and maximal inner transverse diameter of thoracic cavity and calculate the CTR of a chest X-ray image in posterior-anterior (PA) chest view using an artificial intelligence algorithm.
target_condition: Cardiothoracic ratio assessment in chest X-ray imaging
ground_truth: Physician-derived CTR (evaluation by a panel of expert readers)
other_metrics: Quality control model for filtering non-chest X-ray images: Sensitivity 0.99, Accuracy 0.99; Quality control model for filtering non-PA view images: Sensitivity 0.99, Accuracy 0.97; Annotation model for maximal transverse diameter of heart: root-mean-square-error 8.81mm; Annotation model for maximal inner diameter of thoracic cavity: root-mean-square-error 14.3mm; Imaging mode and view identification accuracy: >95%
